title: ODE's with Periodic Input, Resonance
content:
« Previous | Next »
Session Overview We learn how to solve constant coefficient DE’s with periodic input. The method is to use the solution for a single sinusoidal input, which we developed in Unit 2, and then superposition and the Fourier series for the input. We also discuss the relationship of Fourier series to sound waves. Session Activities Read the course notes:
